---
title: "02_data_exploration.Rmd"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

02_data_exploration.Rmd`:
- reads `data/processed/analysis_long.rds`
- reports dataset structure and participation patterns
- summarises score distributions
- explores missingness overall and for social support by cohort
- reports how many rows would remain under listwise deletion
- explicitly states that a listwise-deleted analysis dataset is not created
- saves descriptive figures in `figures/`
